summary: Load sample corpus data (2-3 traditions, ~50 chunks) via scripts/seed-dev.ts

resolution.note: scripts/seed-dev.ts seeds 3 traditions (Gnosticism, Hermeticism, Vedanta), 5 texts, 12 chunks with zeroed 768-dim embeddings, 4 concepts, 8 edges. Transactional, ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. npm run seed-dev wired.
